languages.text: [Знакомая ситуация, знакомые слова. Все повторяется по кругу вновь — в ваших силах следовать ему или попытаться разорвать цикл.]
[The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]
languages.original_text: [Знакомая ситуация, знакомые слова. Все повторяется по кругу вновь — в ваших силах следовать ему или попытаться разорвать цикл.]

traits.locale_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]
[The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]
[The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]

languages.text: 【相同的局势，相同的说辞。一切都在原地打转。你可以选择按既定轨迹走下去，或是设法打破循环。】
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]

traits.locale_text: 【相同的局势，相同的说辞。一切都在原地打转。你可以选择按既定轨迹走下去，或是设法打破循环。】

languages.text: [La même situation, les mêmes propos. Tout ici se répète tel un cercle infernal. Il ne tient qu'à vous de le suivre ou de tenter d'y mettre un terme une fois pour toutes.]
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]

traits.locale_text: [La même situation, les mêmes propos. Tout ici se répète tel un cercle infernal. Il ne tient qu'à vous de le suivre ou de tenter d'y mettre un terme une fois pour toutes.]

languages.text: [Aynı durum, aynı sözler. Her şey bir döngüden ibaret. Döngüyü takip mi edeceksin yoksa tamamen kırmaya mı çalışacaksın... Artık karar verebilirsin.]
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]

traits.locale_text: [Aynı durum, aynı sözler. Her şey bir döngüden ibaret. Döngüyü takip mi edeceksin yoksa tamamen kırmaya mı çalışacaksın... Artık karar verebilirsin.]

languages.text: [La misma situación. Las mismas palabras. El ciclo se repite una vez más ante ti. Debes decidir si seguirlo o intentar romperlo por completo.]
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]

traits.locale_text: [La misma situación. Las mismas palabras. El ciclo se repite una vez más ante ti. Debes decidir si seguirlo o intentar romperlo por completo.]

languages.text: [Dieselbe Situation, dieselben Worte. Alles dreht sich im Kreis. Du kannst mitspielen oder versuchen, den Kreis zu durchbrechen.]
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]

traits.locale_text: [Dieselbe Situation, dieselben Worte. Alles dreht sich im Kreis. Du kannst mitspielen oder versuchen, den Kreis zu durchbrechen.]

languages.text: 同じ状況、同じ言葉。全てが円になっていく。それを追うか、完全に壊そうか、君が決める。
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is going around in a circle. You can decide whether to follow it or to try to break it completely.]

traits.locale_text: 同じ状況、同じ言葉。全てが円になっていく。それを追うか、完全に壊そうか、君が決める。
